texto: The rolling stone rolls echoing from rock to rock
autor: but the rolling stone is dead. The moss is silent because the moss is alive.
explicacao: Citação de but the rolling stone is dead. The moss is silent because the moss is alive. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The rolling stone rolls echoing from rock to rock” articula reflexao, g-k-chesterton, rolling em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
